policy: Macro cycle rules translate cycle phase into asset posture. These are posture rules, not exact portfolio weights. Exact sizing must be derived later from user risk, account constraints, tax basis, and evidence quality.

crisis_capitulation.label: Crisis / capitulation
crisis_capitulation.meaning: Forced selling, pessimism, and liquidity stress dominate. The opportunity is created by distress, not by comfort.
crisis_capitulation.rewarded_behavior: Patient accumulation, cash discipline, quality selection, avoiding forced selling.
crisis_capitulation.common_mistake: Selling durable assets after the reset has already repriced risk.

QQQ / growth.condition: Avoid speculative unprofitable duration until liquidity repair.

Bonds / TLT.condition: Best when growth slows and inflation pressure cools.

Gold.condition: Increase if real-rate, banking, or geopolitical stress confirms.

Oil / energy.condition: Own only in inflation/supply shock, not demand destruction.

Cash.condition: Use staged entries, not all-in deployment.

recovery_early_easing.label: Recovery / early easing
recovery_early_easing.meaning: Policy or liquidity turns supportive before broad confidence returns.
recovery_early_easing.rewarded_behavior: Adding duration, quality growth, and durable risk before consensus becomes comfortable.
recovery_early_easing.common_mistake: Waiting for perfect earnings confirmation after price has already moved.

SPX core.condition: Trend must reclaim key moving averages.

QQQ / growth.condition: Works best when rates fall and liquidity improves.

Bonds / TLT.condition: Duration benefits from easing and disinflation.

Gold.condition: May lag if risk-on becomes clean.

Oil / energy.condition: Only favor if recovery is inflationary or supply-constrained.

BTC / crypto beta.condition: Only if liquidity and trend confirm.

expansion_risk_on.label: Expansion / risk-on
expansion_risk_on.meaning: Trend, liquidity, and earnings expectations support risk assets.
expansion_risk_on.rewarded_behavior: Holding core exposure, adding pullbacks, letting winners compound.
expansion_risk_on.common_mistake: Overtrading a healthy uptrend or chasing after sharp extensions.

SPX core.condition: Use ruled add zones, not chase.

Cash.condition: Deploy only into pullbacks or high-evidence ideas.

New opportunities.condition: Evidence >= 80 or deep undervaluation with strong thesis.

euphoria_late_risk_on.label: Euphoria / late risk-on
euphoria_late_risk_on.meaning: Trend remains strong, but capital increasingly chases concentrated winners and future expectations.
euphoria_late_risk_on.rewarded_behavior: Holding winners, trimming excess, rebuilding optionality, hedging selectively.
euphoria_late_risk_on.common_mistake: Confusing trend strength with low risk and adding aggressively near sentiment extremes.

SPX core.condition: Add only on reset into ruled zone.

Bonds / TLT.condition: Accumulate only when rates roll over.

Gold.condition: Increase if real-rate or stress signal confirms.

Oil / energy.condition: Useful only if inflation/supply pressure confirms.

Cash.condition: Raise through trims, not panic selling.

BTC / crypto beta.condition: Reduce if VIX stress or BTC trend breaks.

transition_verification.label: Transition / verification
transition_verification.meaning: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction.
transition_verification.rewarded_behavior: Patience, rule-following, evidence discipline, avoiding premature conviction.
transition_verification.common_mistake: Overcommitting before the next phase is confirmed.

SPX core.condition: Add after 50D reclaim or clean pullback.

Oil / energy.condition: Own only if pressure type is inflationary.

distribution_defensive_reset.label: Distribution / defensive reset
distribution_defensive_reset.meaning: Internal deterioration, volatility, or liquidity pressure is overriding trend confidence.
distribution_defensive_reset.rewarded_behavior: Reducing weak beta, increasing cash, using hedges based on stress type.
distribution_defensive_reset.common_mistake: Averaging down into deteriorating liquidity without a reset signal.

New opportunities.condition: No promotion without reset and evidence.

contraction_reset.label: Contraction / reset
contraction_reset.meaning: Earnings, liquidity, or credit pressure is actively repricing risk assets.
contraction_reset.rewarded_behavior: Capital preservation, liquidity, staged preparation for future accumulation.
contraction_reset.common_mistake: Trying to call the bottom without liquidity or credit repair.

Gold.condition: Useful under uncertainty and policy stress.

Oil / energy.condition: Avoid if recessionary demand pressure dominates.

New opportunities.condition: Build list for next recovery phase.
